content:
### NVDA / NVIDIA に関するXの最新投稿（2026-04-07時点、Latestモードで取得）

以下はキーワード「NVDA OR NVIDIA」にマッチした最新の投稿から、関連性の高いものを選んで抜粋。本文とURLを記載（スパムや低関連は除外）。

1. **本文**: Anthropic now trains Claude across three chip architectures: AWS Trainium, Google TPUs, and NVIDIA GPUs. No other AI lab has this multi-platform compute strategy. If one supplier hits capacity, they shift workloads to another. Infrastructure hedging at scale nobody else is doing.  
   **URL**: https://x.com/vikasmalpani/status/2041491998469947639

2. **本文**: $NVDA  
   If you're an investor, buy slowly every two weeks. Don't lump sum big here.  
   For me, I will be buying BIG if $NVDA can come down just a bit more closer to $130.   
   Until then, a lot of opportunities in the markets in other sectors.  
   （リプライ元もNVDA株分析）  
   **URL**: https://x.com/thestockwhale/status/2041491247957979217

3. **本文**: MU | Micron Technology Analysis 🧵  
   The Company Micron is no longer just a "cyclical memory play." It has evolved into a critical backbone of the AI era. As the leader in HBM3E and upcoming HBM4, Micron is essentially the "fuel tank" for NVIDIA’s high-performance GPUs. ...  
   **URL**: https://x.com/gblmktpulse/status/2041491938185281775

4. **本文**: 今回原因を探っていく中でいつの間にかWindowsのverがBuild 26200(要はテスト環境)になっており、少なくとも次のWindowsのアップデートまでNVIDIAドライバーでの配信は難しそう  
   **URL**: https://x.com/ajkzzz/status/2041491920900493548

5. **本文**: Lmao you and everyone else with an index fund is “forced buying” my investments every week without fail, regardless of price. I appreciate knowing there are always buyers of Apple, NVIDIA, Microsoft, Google, Etc.  
   **URL**: https://x.com/Nuggg36/status/2041491830387204578

これらは直近数分以内の投稿。株価変動やAI関連の議論が主で、NVDA（NVIDIA株）の投資意見や技術ニュースが目立つ。
